rephrased_requirement: Design a file upload and question-answering system utilizing AI, ensuring a p95 response time of 2 seconds, with authentication and authorization for secure access, and providing accurate answers within a 90% confidence interval.
functional_requirements: Users can upload files in various formats (e.g., PDF, DOCX, TXT) up to 10MB in size.
Users can input questions related to the uploaded file content.
The system analyzes the file content and provides relevant answers to user queries.
The system supports multiple file uploads and question-answering sessions concurrently.
non_functional_requirements: The system should achieve a p95 response time of 2 seconds for answering user queries.
The system should handle a minimum of 100 concurrent user sessions.
The system should be scalable to accommodate a 20% increase in user traffic within a 6-month period.
security_requirements: Implement authentication using OAuth 2.0 with JWT tokens.
Authorize user access to uploaded files and question-answering functionality based on role-based access control (RBAC).
Encrypt file uploads and store them securely using AES-256.
Protect against common web vulnerabilities (e.g., SQL injection, cross-site scripting) using OWASP guidelines.
acceptance_criteria: The system responds to user queries within the specified p95 response time of 2 seconds.
The system provides accurate answers to user queries within a 90% confidence interval, as measured by a predefined evaluation dataset.
The system correctly handles file uploads, question-answering sessions, and concurrent user traffic without errors.
recommended_solution_approach: Utilize a cloud-based infrastructure (e.g., AWS, Azure) with containerized microservices (e.g., Docker) and a scalable AI framework (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) to develop the file upload and question-answering system.
open_questions: What is the expected volume of user traffic and file uploads?
What types of files and question-answering domains (e.g., general knowledge, medical, financial) will the system support?
What is the desired confidence interval for answer accuracy, and how will it be measured and evaluated?
